title: Prettier Parrots
description: Remodelled Parrots + New Toucans as variants
body:
Prettier Parrots remodels the vanilla minecraft parrots to make them look cuter and more like actual parrots! as well as adding toucans as new variants! 



**Important!!** This pack required Optifine or Entity Texture Features and Entity Model Features to work!!


Also check out my other packs:

- [Prettier Horses](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-horses)
- [Prettier Cows](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-cows)
